ground_truth.title: Amd RX7800XT Wrong refresh rate ...
ground_truth.author: microfast
ground_truth.main_content:
microfast
30th March 2025, 16:26

Hi to all,

I have tested a Power Color Radeon RX7800XT and when I do play a movies with the usual 23.976 rate (I have tried many software players and renders with the same problem) I do see indicated a wrong rate of 23.951

I have also tried to correct this creating from the control panel a custom resolution ( like it is usual to do with the Nvidia card ) but nothing change, the  refresh rate it is locked to this strange 23.951

I never had a similar issue with AMD card from the old Polaris Rx470 until the RX6xxx Radeon.

I have tried all the drivers from the first supporting this card until the more recent 25.3.1 WHQL with always the same problem.

Have somebody had this issue?

GeoffreyA
2nd April 2025, 13:59

Hi,

Does disabling hardware decoding or acceleration do anything?

I have also tried to correct this creating from the control panel a custom resolution
